title: cucubalus maritimus
intro: Cucubalus maritimus, also known as sea spurrey, is a flowering plant species in the caryophyllaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cucubalus maritimus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Cucubalus maritimus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
